docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,800.00 FILED BY SAMAYOA, MARGIE AS TO DEFENDANT BLACKMAN, PASCAL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-16-2002 AT 06:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAMAYOA, MARGIE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BLACKMAN, PASCAL $1,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $52.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,552.00, PLAINTIFF RETAINS CAR. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, APPELLATE NUMBER 27132, RECORD TRANSFERRED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAMAYOA, MARGIE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BLACKMAN, PASCAL JUDGMENT ENTERED IN SCA 27132 ON 4/3/003 NO EXHIBIT RETURNED TO SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION. $50 COST GO TO THE DEFENDANT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY DEFENDANT BLACKMAN, PASCAL
